name: Barbecue Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray Pam non-stick spray on a muffin pan.
2. Brown the ground beef in a skillet until no longer pink. Add onion or green pepper if desired, and cook until softened.
3. Drain excess grease from the beef mixture.
4. Stir in the barbecue sauce and let it simmer for a few minutes.
5. Arrange biscuits in the muffin cups to form a cup shape.
6. Spoon the beef mixture into each biscuit cup and top with grated cheese.
7. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 12 minutes, or until the biscuits are cooked through and golden brown.
